---
title: "https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513543"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2026-01-01
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

{**[Case 4-2026: An 80-Year-Old Woman with Cough and Hypoxemia](https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513543)**
[0.5cm]
{**病例 4-2026：一位80歲女性，主訴咳嗽與低血氧症**}
[0.3cm]
{N Engl J Med 2026;394:498-507   [DOI: 10.1056/NEJMcpc2513543](https://doi.org/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513543)}
[0.3cm]
{January 29, 2026}


## 病例概述


### 臨床表現

一位80歲女性因cough(咳嗽)及hypoxemia(低血氧症)至Massachusetts General Hospital就診。病人於八週前開始出現productive cough(有痰咳嗽)，伴隨fatigue(疲倦)、poor appetite(食慾不振)及weight loss(體重減輕)。


### 病史時序


| p{12cm}}  **時間點** | **重要事件與發現** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **8週前** | **症狀開始**    - Productive cough開始    - Rhinorrhea(流鼻水)及headache(頭痛)    - Fatigue及poor appetite    - 病人自認為流感，未就醫 |  |
| **5週前** | **Herpes Zoster診斷**    - 左側腹部dermatomal分佈的pruritic, vesicular rash    - **Subjective chills(重要線索！)**    - 開始valacyclovir治療    - 隔天出現nausea及vomiting(歸因於藥物副作用)    - 完成14天療程 |  |
| **6天前** | **Urgent Care就診**    - Subjective fever出現    - **Weight loss: 6.1 kg (9個月內)**    - Vital signs: T 37.2°C, BP 122/86, HR 78, RR 18, SpO$_2$ 94  - Chest X-ray: reportedly normal with possible trace fluid in fissure    - 開立doxycycline 5天及benzonatate |  |
| **就診當日** | **急診就診**    - 完成doxycycline療程後一天，shortness of breath出現    - **SpO$_2$ 83  - 需4 L/min O$_2$ via nasal cannula維持SpO$_2$ 93  - 發現diffuse ground-glass opacities on CT |  |


### 重要病史


| p{11cm}}  **類別** | **內容** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Past Medical History** | - Allergic rhinitis    - Anxiety    - Chronic kidney disease    - **Metastatic squamous-cell carcinoma of unknown primary (1年前)**        → Left axillary lymph node involvement        → Left tonsillar pillar hypermetabolism on PET-CT        → Tonsillectomy: no cancer found        → Lymphadenectomy: 8 nodes removed, only 1 with cancer |  |
| **Medications** | - Citalopram    - Loratadine    - Fluticasone propionate nasal spray |  |
| **Allergies** | No known drug allergies |  |
| **Social History** | - **Retired from nonprofit organization**    - **Extensive international travel:**        → South America, Central America, East Africa        → **Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania (6年前)**    - **Sexually active until 2 years before presentation**    - Single, lives in Massachusetts, no pets    - Lifelong nonsmoker    - No illicit drug use    - Alcohol: one glass of wine per week |  |
| **Family History** | - Mother  | maternal grandmother: hypertension    - Father: died from gastric cancer at age 53 |


importantbox
**關鍵病史線索**

此病人有多項HIV感染的風險因子：

1. **旅遊至HIV高流行地區**：東非(Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania)
2. **性活動史**：2年前仍有性活動
3. **Herpes zoster**：雖常見於老年人，但也可能是immunodeficiency的徵兆
4. **Squamous-cell carcinoma of unknown primary**：可能與免疫功能低下相關


importantbox


### 理學檢查


| p{11cm}}  **項目** | **發現** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Vital Signs** | - Temperature: 37.3°C    - Blood pressure: 158/86 mmHg    - Heart rate: 93 bpm    - Respiratory rate: 16 breaths/min    - **SpO$_2$: 83 |  |
| **General** | - Coughing but able to speak in complete sentences    - No respiratory distress |  |
| **HEENT** | - Oropharynx clear |  |
| **Pulmonary** | - **Rhonchi over all lung fields**    - Most prominent over right lower lobe |  |
| **Cardiovascular** | - Regular rate and rhythm    - No murmurs    - No jugular venous distention |  |
| **Extremities** | - No clubbing    - No edema |  |
| **Other** | - Remainder of examination normal |  |


### 實驗室檢查


importantbox
**關鍵實驗室發現**

- **CRP: 52.7 mg/L (↑, ref: <8.0)** — 發炎反應
- **ESR: 58 mm/hr (↑, ref: 0-29)** — 發炎反應
- Procalcitonin: 0.11 ng/mL (normal, ref: <0.25) — **不支持典型細菌感染**
- **Lymphocytes: 740/μL (偏低, ref: 720-4100)** — 可能暗示細胞免疫缺陷
- Hemoglobin: 12.1 g/dL (正常偏低)
- WBC: 7,810/μL (正常)


importantbox


| p{3cm} p{3cm} p{5cm}}  **Test    檢驗項目** | **Result    結果** | **Reference    參考值** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Complete Blood Count 全血球計數** |  |  |
| Hemoglobin | 12.1 g/dL | 12-16 |
| Hematocrit | 35.3 | 36-46 |
| WBC | 7,810/μL | 4,000-11,000 |
| Neutrophils | 6,230/μL | 1,920-7,600 |
| Lymphocytes | 740/μL | 720-4,100 |
| Monocytes | 690/μL | 160-1,100 |
| Platelet count | 296,000/μL | 150,000-450,000 |
| **Inflammatory Markers 發炎指標** |  |  |
| CRP | 52.7 mg/L | <8.0 |
| ESR | 58 mm/hr | 0-29 |
| Procalcitonin | 0.11 ng/mL | <0.25 |
| **Blood Gas 血液氣體分析** |  |  |
| pH (venous) | 7.48 | 7.30-7.40 |
| pO$_2$ (venous) | 49 mmHg | 35-50 |
| pCO$_2$ (venous) | 32 mmHg | 38-50 |
| **Other Tests 其他檢驗** |  |  |
| NT-proBNP | 704 pg/mL | 0-1,800 |
| SARS-CoV-2 | Negative | — |
| Influenza A/B | Negative | — |
| RSV | Negative | — |
| Extended respiratory viral panel | Negative | — |
| *B. pertussis/parapertussis* | Negative | — |
| *C. pneumoniae* | Negative | — |
| *M. pneumoniae* | Negative | — |


**Procalcitonin的臨床意義**

Procalcitonin是診斷細菌感染的重要biomarker：

- 典型細菌感染時升高
- **其他感染性或發炎性疾病時通常不升高**
- 本病例procalcitonin正常但CRP/ESR升高，提示非典型感染（如真菌、病毒、分枝桿菌）或發炎性疾病


## 影像學發現


### Chest Radiograph (入院時)


- Hazy perihilar opacities with indistinct pulmonary vasculature
- Linear opacities at lung bases (most likely subsegmental atelectasis)
- Normal cardiac silhouette
- No pleural effusion


### Chest CT


importantbox
**關鍵影像發現**

- **Diffuse ground-glass opacities in both lungs**
- **Central (rather than peripheral) distribution**
- **Apical predominance, sparing lung bases**
- Trace interlobular septal thickening
- No pleural effusion
- Normal cardiac chambers
- No pulmonary nodules, cysts, or bronchiectasis
- **No lymphadenopathy**


這種**central, apical-predominant ground-glass opacities**的pattern高度提示***Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia (PJP)**！
importantbox


## 鑑別診斷


### 臨床推理架構


**Dr. Shreya Shrestha的診斷思路**

面對這位80歲女性的subacute respiratory syndrome，診斷推理聚焦於：

1. **症狀進展時程**：8週的subacute course — 不符合典型細菌性肺炎
2. **Procalcitonin正常**：不支持典型細菌感染
3. **CT findings**：Central ground-glass opacities with apical predominance
4. **Risk factors**：旅遊史、性活動史、recent herpes zoster


### 鑑別診斷分析


| p{4cm} p{4cm} p{3.5cm}}  **Differential Diagnosis    鑑別診斷** | **Supporting Evidence    支持證據** | **Against    不支持證據** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **感染 (Infection)** |  |  |
| **Bacterial Pneumonia**    細菌性肺炎 | - Fever    - Cough    - Hypoxemia | - **8週的subacute course**    - Procalcitonin正常    - 對doxycycline及azithromycin無反應 |
| **Atypical Pneumonia**    非典型肺炎 | - Subacute course possible | - **Testing negative for *C. pneumoniae*, *M. pneumoniae***    - 對doxycycline無反應 |
| **Viral Pneumonia**    病毒性肺炎 | - Subacute course可能 | - **Extended viral panel全部negative**    - SARS-CoV-2, influenza, RSV negative |
| **Disseminated VZV**    播散性帶狀疱疹病毒 | - Recent herpes zoster | - **Shortness of breath出現在herpes zoster後5週**（通常dissemination在1週內）    - VZV pneumonitis通常為nodular pattern |
| **Tuberculosis**    結核病 | - Travel to endemic areas    - Subacute course | - **CT findings不符合**（無consolidation, cavity, lymphadenopathy）    - Ground-glass pattern atypical |
| **Endemic Mycoses**    地方性黴菌病 | - Travel to Central/South America    - (Histoplasmosis, Coccidioidomycosis) | - **CT findings不符合**（無nodules, lymphadenopathy）    - 6年前旅遊（時間較久遠） |
| **惡性腫瘤 (Cancer)** |  |  |
| **Recurrent/Metastatic Cancer**    復發/轉移性癌症 | - History of metastatic SCC | - **Prior lymphadenectomy showed no residual disease**    - No mass or consolidation on CT |
| **Lymphangitic Carcinomatosis**    淋巴管性癌病 | - History of malignancy | - **CT findings不符合**（無nodular septal thickening） |
| **Lymphoma with Pulmonary Involvement**    肺部淋巴瘤 | — | - **No mass or masslike consolidation**    - No lymphadenopathy |
| **自體免疫/發炎性疾病 (Autoimmune/Inflammatory)** |  |  |
| **ANCA-associated Vasculitis**    ANCA相關血管炎 | - Ground-glass opacities可由pulmonary hemorrhage引起 | - **無multisystem involvement**    - No glomerulonephritis    - No neuropathy    - No purpura |
| **Connective Tissue Disorders**    結締組織疾病 | - GGO可見於SLE pneumonitis | - **無multisystem involvement**    - No pleural/pericardial effusion    - No fibrosis |
| **emergency_red{免疫缺陷相關感染 (Immunocompromised Host)**} |  |  |
| **emergency_red**{*Pneumocystis jirovecii* Pneumonia (PJP)}    **肺囊蟲肺炎** | - **Subacute course (days to weeks)**    - **Cough, dyspnea, fever**    - **Weight loss, anorexia**    - **Bilateral GGO on CT**    - **Central, apical predominance**    - **Risk factors for HIV** | - 需確認HIV status |


importantbox
**Dr. Shrestha的診斷推論**

關鍵的思維轉折：**考慮免疫缺陷狀態**


1. **Herpes zoster**：雖常見於老年人，但也可能提示underlying immunodeficiency
2. **Travel history**：East Africa (Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania) — **HIV高流行區**
3. **Sexual history**：2年前仍有性活動 — 可能的HIV transmission route
4. **Clinical timeline**：Subacute course + CT findings → 高度符合PJP


**最可能的診斷**：**HIV-AIDS complicated by *Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia**
importantbox


## 診斷檢驗結果


### HIV Testing


> **HIV-1/HIV-2 Antigen-Antibody Combination Immunoassay**: **REACTIVE**
> **Confirmatory Testing**: Positive for **HIV-1**
> **HIV-1 Viral Load**: **223,000 copies/mL**
> **CD4 Cell Count**: **33/μL** (severely immunocompromised)
> **診斷確立**：**Advanced HIV-1 infection (AIDS)**
> *CD4 count <200/μL 符合AIDS定義*


### PJP Testing


| p{10cm}}  **Test** | **Result  | Interpretation** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Induced Sputum Gram Stain | No PMNs, rare squamous epithelial cells, no organisms |  |
| **Induced Sputum DFA for *P. jirovecii*** | ****Negative****    *Note: Sensitivity 67-99 |  |
| **Serum 1,3-β-D-glucan** | ****>500 pg/mL**** (ref: <60)    *Strongly positive — increased suspicion for PJP* |  |
| **BAL DFA for *P. jirovecii*** | ****POSITIVE****    *Sensitivity 90-99 |  |


### Additional Finding: Cryptococcal Infection


> **BAL Fungal Culture (Hospital Day 3)**: **Positive for *Cryptococcus neoformans***
> **Serum Cryptococcal Antigen**: Negative (×2)
> **Interpretation**:
> itemize
>     \item Cryptococcal antigen testing對disseminated或CNS disease最敏感
>     \item 對isolated pulmonary infection with low fungal burden可能為negative
>     \item 此病人為**pulmonary cryptococcosis**
> itemize
> **Lumbar Puncture**: 排除cryptococcal meningitis


## 最終診斷


# Advanced HIV-1 Infection (AIDS)

0.9\textwidth{

**Advanced HIV-1 Infection (AIDS)**
**with *Pneumocystis jirovecii** Pneumonia*
**and *Cryptococcus neoformans** Pneumonia*
[0.3cm]
**晚期人類免疫缺陷病毒第一型感染（愛滋病）**
**合併肺囊蟲肺炎及隱球菌肺炎**
}


## 醫學英文寫作解析


| p{5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3cm}}  **Original Sentence    原文例句** | **Grammar Structure    文法結構** | **Chinese Translation    中文翻譯** | **Writing Technique    寫作技巧** |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| "The patient had been in her usual state of health — active in her community and biking to appointments — until 8 weeks before the current presentation, when a productive cough developed." | Past perfect + temporal clause with em-dash interruption | 病人一直維持平常的健康狀態——活躍於社區並騎腳踏車赴約——直到就診前8週出現有痰咳嗽。 | 使用em-dash插入補充資訊    建立發病前的基準狀態 |  |  |
| "It is notable that the level of procalcitonin... was not elevated in this patient." | It is notable that + noun clause | 值得注意的是，此病人的procalcitonin...並未升高。 | 用於強調重要的陰性發現    引導讀者注意診斷線索 |  |  |
| "Given the undifferentiated nature of the patient's subacute respiratory syndrome, I will begin by considering broad categories of disease." | Given + noun phrase, subject + future verb | 鑑於病人亞急性呼吸道症候群的未分化特性，我將從考慮疾病的廣泛類別開始。 | "Given"引導診斷推理過程    展現系統性思維 |  |  |
| "Pivoting into this theory requires revisiting this patient's clinical timeline, not just in the past several weeks but in the past decade." | Gerund subject + requires + gerund object | 轉向這個理論需要重新審視這位病人的臨床時間線，不僅是過去幾週，還包括過去十年。 | "Pivoting"表示診斷思維的轉折    強調完整病史的重要性 |  |  |
| "This patient is older than the typical patient with a new onset of HIV infection, but when risk factors are present... testing is imperative." | Comparative + concessive clause + when-clause | 這位病人比典型新發HIV感染病人年長，但當存在風險因子時...檢測是必要的。 | 處理非典型病例的寫作方式    強調風險評估的重要性 |  |  |
| "The recent diagnosis of herpes zoster, which can be an immunodeficiency-related syndrome, is likely to be another major clue." | Noun + non-restrictive relative clause + predicate | 最近診斷的帶狀疱疹——可能是免疫缺陷相關症候群——可能是另一個重要線索。 | Non-restrictive clause提供額外資訊    連結症狀與underlying condition |  |  |


## 討論


### HIV/AIDS in Older Adults


> **流行病學 (2021年美國數據)**:
> itemize
>     \item 41
>     \item 在≥55歲時診斷HIV的人中，**34
>     \item 意味著診斷時疾病已是晚期
> itemize
> **Screening barriers in older adults**:
> itemize
>     \item 就診時需討論的議題太多
>     \item 社會規範使討論性健康較困難
>     \item 可能的embarrassment
>     \item 臨床醫師對老年人性活動的assumptions
> itemize
> **Key message**: 當存在風險因子時，**不論年齡都應進行HIV篩檢**！


### *Pneumocystis jirovecii
 Pneumonia (PJP)*


| p{11cm}}  **項目** | **內容** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **病原體** | *Pneumocystis jirovecii*    - 原先被分類為protozoan    - 現在認定為ascomycetous fungus    - 無法在routine mycology media上培養 |  |
| **Clinical Presentation** | - Cough, dyspnea, fever    - Course: days to weeks (subacute)    - Weight loss, anorexia常見    - **CD4 count通常≤200/μL時發生** |  |
| **CT Findings** | - **Bilateral ground-glass opacities**    - Central (perihilar) distribution    - Apical predominance    - Patchy consolidation可能存在    - Interlobular septal thickening可能存在 |  |
| **歷史意義** | - 1981年報告的第一批AIDS-defining illnesses之一    - 至今仍是HIV感染者最常見的opportunistic infections之一 |  |


### PJP的診斷方法


| p{4cm} p{7cm}}  **Method** | **Sensitivity (HIV+)** | **Notes** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Induced Sputum DFA** | 67-99 | First-line non-invasive test    Sensitivity <50 |
| **BAL DFA** | **90-99 | Gold standard if sputum negative    Specificity >99 |
| **Serum 1,3-β-D-glucan** | Variable | Elevated in PJP    Also elevated in other fungal infections    Useful adjunct test |
| **Nucleic Acid Amplification** | Highest | Interpretation challenging    May detect colonization vs infection |


### PJP Treatment


importantbox
**PJP治療原則**

**First-line treatment**:

- **High-dose Trimethoprim-Sulfamethoxazole (TMP-SMX)**
- Strongly preferred over alternatives due to superior efficacy
- Duration: typically 21 days
- Monitor: potassium levels, kidney function


**Adjunctive Glucocorticoid Therapy**:

- Indicated for **moderate-to-severe PJP**:     itemize
- PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg on room air, OR
- A-a gradient ≥35 mmHg


    \item Purpose: attenuate inflammatory response to dying organisms
    \item Start within 72 hours of antimicrobial therapy
itemize
importantbox


### Cryptococcal Infection的處理


**本病例的Cryptococcal Infection**


- BAL culture positive for *C. neoformans*
- Serum cryptococcal antigen negative (×2)
- Lumbar puncture: 排除CNS involvement


**Treatment consideration**:

- Negative serum antigen + negative CSF → likely localized pulmonary disease
- Treatment with fluconazole initiated
- Duration: total 6 months


**Important**: Multiple concurrent opportunistic infections are common when CD4 count is severely low.


### Antiretroviral Therapy (ART) Timing


> **General principle**: Early ART leads to:
> itemize
>     \item Fewer AIDS-defining diseases
>     \item Lower risk of death
>     \item Greater viral suppression
>     \item Better patient retention in care
> itemize
> **Exception — Cryptococcal Meningitis**:
> itemize
>     \item Studies from sub-Saharan Africa show **increased morbidity/mortality with early ART**
>     \item Guidelines recommend **delaying ART** in cryptococcal meningitis
> itemize
> **This patient**:
> itemize
>     \item CSF analysis ruled out cryptococcal meningitis
>     \item → ART (bictegravir-emtricitabine-tenofovir alafenamide) was started
> itemize


## 治療計畫


### Pharmacological Treatment 藥物治療


| p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{5cm}}  **Drug    (Generic Name)** | **Dose    劑量** | **Route    途徑** | **Frequency    頻率** | **Indication/Mechanism    適應症/機轉** |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Initial Empiric Treatment (急診)** |  |  |  |  |  |
| Ceftriaxone | 2 g | IV | QD | Community-acquired pneumonia    社區型肺炎經驗性治療 |  |
| Azithromycin | 500 mg | PO | QD | Atypical coverage    非典型病原體覆蓋 |  |
| **PJP Treatment (確診後)** |  |  |  |  |  |
| Trimethoprim-Sulfamethoxazole | High dose | IV→PO | Per protocol | **First-line for PJP**    Inhibits folate synthesis    抑制葉酸合成 |  |
| Prednisone | Taper | PO | Per protocol | **Adjunctive therapy for severe PJP**    Attenuates inflammatory response    減緩發炎反應 |  |
| **Cryptococcal Pneumonia Treatment** |  |  |  |  |  |
| Fluconazole | 400 mg | PO | QD | Treatment for pulmonary cryptococcosis    Duration: 6 months total    肺部隱球菌感染治療 |  |
| **Antiretroviral Therapy (ART)** |  |  |  |  |  |
| Bictegravir-Emtricitabine-Tenofovir alafenamide | Fixed dose | PO | QD | **Single-tablet regimen for HIV**    Integrase inhibitor + 2 NRTIs    HIV抗病毒治療 |  |
| **Prophylaxis (after acute treatment)** |  |  |  |  |  |
| TMP-SMX | Prophylactic dose | PO | QD | PJP prophylaxis (continue until CD4 >200 × 3 months)    肺囊蟲預防 |  |


## 病人預後


> **Treatment Response**:
> itemize
>     \item Favorable response to treatment
>     \item Marked decrease in symptoms
>     \item Improvement in oxygenation
> itemize
> **HIV Viral Load**: Quickly became **undetectable**
> **Social Considerations**:
> itemize
>     \item Initial high copay ($700/month for first month)
>     \item Subsequently enrolled in **AIDS Drug Assistance Program (ADAP)**
>     \item Ryan White HIV/AIDS Program support
> itemize
> **Current Status**:
> itemize
>     \item Complete resolution of shortness of breath
>     \item Slower resolution of fatigue
>     \item Focus shifted to HIV-informed health maintenance
>     \item Patient is dating, knowing that **"U = U: undetectable = untransmissible"**
> itemize


## 學習重點 (Key Takeaways)


**1. HIV Screening in Older Adults**

- 41
- 34
- **Risk factors存在時，不論年齡都應篩檢HIV**
- 使用"5 Ps"評估性健康：Partners, Practices, Protection, Past STIs, Pregnancy intention


**2. *Pneumocystis jirovecii** Pneumonia的臨床特徵*

- Subacute course (days to weeks)
- Cough, dyspnea, fever, weight loss
- CD4 count通常≤200/μL
- CT: Bilateral ground-glass opacities, central distribution, apical predominance
- **Procalcitonin通常正常**（非典型細菌感染）


**3. PJP的診斷**

- *P. jirovecii*是fungus，不會在routine media上生長
- DFA (direct fluorescent antibody)是standard approach
- Induced sputum sensitivity: 67-99
- BAL sensitivity: 90-99
- 1,3-β-D-glucan是useful adjunct test


**4. PJP治療原則**

- First-line: High-dose TMP-SMX
- Duration: 21 days for HIV patients
- Adjunctive steroids: 用於moderate-to-severe PJP (PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg or A-a gradient ≥35 mmHg)
- After treatment: prophylaxis until CD4 >200 for 3 months


**5. Multiple Opportunistic Infections**

- Severely immunocompromised patients可有多種concurrent infections
- 本病例：PJP + pulmonary cryptococcosis
- 考慮additional workup when response to treatment is incomplete


**6. ART Initiation Timing**

- Generally: Early ART improves outcomes
- Exception: Cryptococcal meningitis — delay ART
- 本病例：CSF negative → 可以start ART
- U = U: Undetectable = Untransmissible


## 自我測驗 (Self-Assessment Quiz)


### 題目 (Questions)


**Question 1.** An 80-year-old woman presents with 8 weeks of cough, fatigue, and weight loss. Oxygen saturation is 83

一位80歲女性主訴8週的咳嗽、疲倦及體重減輕。室內空氣下血氧飽和度為83


1. Community-acquired bacterial pneumonia
2. Influenza pneumonia
3. *Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia
4. Pulmonary tuberculosis
5. ANCA-associated vasculitis with pulmonary hemorrhage


**Question 2.** Which of the following CT findings is most characteristic of *Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia in HIV patients?

下列何種CT發現最符合HIV病人的肺囊蟲肺炎特徵？


1. Peripheral consolidations with air bronchograms
2. Upper lobe cavitary lesions with tree-in-bud nodules
3. Bilateral ground-glass opacities with central and apical predominance
4. Hilar and mediastinal lymphadenopathy
5. Pleural effusion with nodular septal thickening


**Question 3.** A patient with suspected PJP has a negative direct fluorescent antibody test on induced sputum. The serum 1,3-β-D-glucan level is >500 pg/mL. What is the most appropriate next step?

一位懷疑PJP的病人誘導痰液直接免疫螢光抗體檢測為陰性。血清1,3-β-D-glucan >500 pg/mL。下一步最適當的處置為何？


1. Repeat induced sputum testing
2. Start empiric treatment and observe
3. Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for DFA testing
4. Order CT-guided lung biopsy
5. Discontinue workup as the negative sputum rules out PJP


**Question 4.** Which statement about procalcitonin in the evaluation of pneumonia is correct?

關於procalcitonin在肺炎評估中的應用，下列敘述何者正確？


1. Procalcitonin is elevated in all types of pneumonia
2. Normal procalcitonin rules out any infectious cause
3. Procalcitonin is typically elevated in bacterial infections but not in PJP
4. Procalcitonin is most useful for diagnosing fungal infections
5. Procalcitonin should not be used in immunocompromised patients


**Question 5.** Adjunctive glucocorticoid therapy for PJP is indicated in which of the following situations?

PJP的輔助性類固醇治療在下列何種情況下有適應症？


1. All patients with confirmed PJP
2. Patients with mild hypoxemia (SpO$_2$ 92
3. Patients with PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg on room air or A-a gradient ≥35 mmHg
4. Only patients who fail initial antimicrobial therapy
5. Patients with coexisting cryptococcal meningitis


**Question 6.** In this case, the patient was found to have *Cryptococcus neoformans* in BAL culture but negative serum cryptococcal antigen. Which of the following explains this finding?

本病例中，病人BAL培養發現隱球菌但血清隱球菌抗原為陰性。下列何者可解釋此發現？


1. The BAL culture result is a false positive
2. Cryptococcal antigen testing is unreliable
3. Cryptococcal antigen testing is most sensitive for disseminated or CNS disease and may be negative in isolated pulmonary infection with low fungal burden
4. The patient has protective immunity against cryptococcus
5. Antigen testing should be repeated multiple times


**Question 7.** Regarding HIV screening in older adults, which statement is correct?

關於老年人的HIV篩檢，下列敘述何者正確？


1. HIV screening is not recommended for adults over 65 years
2. In 2021, 41
3. Older adults are more likely to be diagnosed at early stages of HIV infection
4. Sexual history is not relevant in patients over 70 years old
5. HIV infection does not occur in older adults


**Question 8.** What is the first-line treatment for *Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia?

肺囊蟲肺炎的第一線治療為何？


1. Fluconazole
2. Trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole
3. Amphotericin B
4. Caspofungin
5. Voriconazole


**Question 9.** A newly diagnosed HIV patient with PJP is found to have *Cryptococcus* in BAL culture. Lumbar puncture is performed and CSF analysis is negative for cryptococcal involvement. When should antiretroviral therapy be initiated?

一位新診斷HIV病人同時有PJP，BAL培養發現隱球菌。腰椎穿刺顯示CSF無隱球菌侵犯。何時應開始抗反轉錄病毒治療？


1. Delay ART for at least 4 weeks
2. Start ART immediately or early, since there is no cryptococcal meningitis
3. Wait until PJP treatment is completed
4. ART should not be started until CD4 count improves
5. Delay ART for 6 months


**Question 10.** A 75-year-old man presents with subacute cough and is found to have herpes zoster. He has a history of travel to sub-Saharan Africa and was sexually active until recently. What additional testing should be considered?

一位75歲男性主訴亞急性咳嗽，發現有帶狀疱疹。有撒哈拉以南非洲旅遊史且近期仍有性活動。應考慮什麼額外檢查？


1. No additional testing needed as herpes zoster is common in elderly
2. HIV testing due to risk factors and immunodeficiency-associated presentation
3. Only tuberculosis testing
4. Hepatitis B and C testing only
5. Repeat chest X-ray in 6 weeks


---


### 答案與解析 (Answers and Explanations)


**Question 1. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: The subacute course (8 weeks), bilateral ground-glass opacities with central distribution and apical predominance, normal procalcitonin (not elevated in non-bacterial infections), and significant hypoxemia are classic features of *Pneumocystis jirovecii* pneumonia. The CT pattern is particularly characteristic of PJP.

**解析**：亞急性病程（8週）、雙側毛玻璃狀混濁呈中央分佈和上肺優勢、procalcitonin正常（非細菌感染時不升高）、以及顯著低血氧，都是肺囊蟲肺炎的經典特徵。CT影像模式特別符合PJP。


**Question 2. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: PJP in HIV patients characteristically presents with bilateral ground-glass opacities that are central (perihilar) rather than peripheral, with apical predominance and often sparing of the lung bases. This pattern is present in the majority of HIV-infected patients with PJP.

**解析**：HIV病人的PJP特徵性表現為雙側毛玻璃狀混濁，呈中央（肺門周圍）而非周邊分佈，上肺優勢且常常sparing肺底部。這種模式存在於大多數HIV感染合併PJP的病人。


**Question 3. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: When induced sputum DFA is negative but clinical suspicion remains high (especially with a strongly positive 1,3-β-D-glucan), bronchoalveolar lavage should be performed. BAL has superior sensitivity (90-99

**解析**：當誘導痰液DFA陰性但臨床懷疑度仍高時（特別是1,3-β-D-glucan強陽性），應進行支氣管肺泡灌洗。BAL對HIV病人PJP診斷的敏感度（90-99


**Question 4. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: Procalcitonin is a serum biomarker that is often elevated in patients with bacterial infections but not in those with other infectious (viral, fungal) or inflammatory diseases. In this case, normal procalcitonin helped point away from typical bacterial pneumonia.

**解析**：Procalcitonin是一種血清生物標記，在細菌感染病人中常升高，但在其他感染性（病毒、真菌）或發炎性疾病中通常不升高。本病例中，procalcitonin正常有助於排除典型細菌性肺炎。


**Question 5. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: Adjunctive glucocorticoid therapy is indicated for patients with moderate-to-severe PJP, defined by PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg while breathing ambient air or an alveolar-arterial gradient ≥35 mmHg. It helps attenuate inflammation from the immune response to dying organisms.

**解析**：輔助性類固醇治療適用於中重度PJP病人，定義為呼吸室內空氣時PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg或肺泡-動脈梯度≥35 mmHg。它有助於減緩對dying organisms的免疫反應引起的發炎。


**Question 6. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: Cryptococcal antigen testing is most sensitive for disseminated or CNS disease. It may be negative in cases of isolated pulmonary infection when the fungal burden is low. This explains the discordance between positive culture and negative antigen test.

**解析**：隱球菌抗原檢測對播散性或CNS疾病最敏感。在真菌負荷較低的isolated肺部感染病例中可能為陰性。這解釋了培養陽性但抗原檢測陰性的差異。


**Question 7. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: In 2021, 41

**解析**：2021年美國41


**Question 8. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: High-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole is the first-line treatment for PJP and is strongly preferred over alternative agents due to superior efficacy. Treatment duration is typically 21 days for HIV-infected patients.

**解析**：高劑量trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole是PJP的第一線治療，因其療效優越而強烈優先於其他替代藥物。HIV感染病人的治療療程通常為21天。


**Question 9. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: Early ART initiation is generally recommended as it leads to fewer AIDS-defining diseases and lower mortality. The exception is cryptococcal meningitis, where delayed ART is recommended. Since this patient's CSF was negative for cryptococcal involvement, ART can be started early.

**解析**：一般建議早期開始ART，因為這可減少AIDS-defining疾病和降低死亡率。例外是隱球菌腦膜炎，建議延遲ART。由於此病人的CSF無隱球菌侵犯，可以早期開始ART。


**Question 10. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: While herpes zoster is common in elderly patients, it can also indicate underlying immunodeficiency. Combined with travel to HIV-endemic areas (sub-Saharan Africa) and recent sexual activity, HIV testing is warranted. Risk factor assessment should guide screening regardless of age.

**解析**：雖然帶狀疱疹在老年人中常見，但也可能提示underlying免疫缺陷。結合旅遊至HIV流行地區（撒哈拉以南非洲）和近期性活動，應進行HIV檢測。風險因子評估應指導篩檢，不論年齡。


## 總結


importantbox
**本病例的關鍵學習要點**


1. **HIV/AIDS in Older Adults**: 41
2. **Risk Factor Assessment**: 旅遊史、性活動史、herpes zoster — 三者結合應高度懷疑HIV
3. **PJP的CT Pattern**: Bilateral ground-glass opacities, central distribution, apical predominance
4. **Procalcitonin的診斷價值**: 正常時不支持典型細菌感染，應考慮其他病原體
5. **PJP Diagnosis Cascade**: Induced sputum DFA → BAL DFA (if negative); 1,3-β-D-glucan is useful adjunct
6. **Multiple Opportunistic Infections**: CD4極低時可有concurrent infections (PJP + Cryptococcus)


importantbox


> *"This patient is older than the typical patient with a new onset of HIV infection, but when risk factors are present — such as travel and sexual history — testing is imperative."*
> **— Dr. Shreya Shrestha**


**0.8\linewidth**{0.5pt}


## 附錄: PJP & HIV/AIDS快速參考


| p{11cm}}  **項目** | **內容** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **病原體** | *Pneumocystis jirovecii* — Ascomycetous fungus (formerly classified as protozoan) |  |
| **Risk Factor** | CD4 count ≤200/μL |  |
| **Clinical Presentation** | - Subacute course (days to weeks)    - Cough, dyspnea, fever    - Weight loss, anorexia    - Significant hypoxemia |  |
| **CT Findings** | - Bilateral ground-glass opacities    - Central (perihilar) distribution    - Apical predominance    - May have septal thickening |  |
| **Laboratory Clues** | - Normal procalcitonin (不支持典型細菌感染)    - Elevated 1,3-β-D-glucan    - Elevated LDH (非特異性) |  |
| **Diagnosis** | - Induced sputum DFA (sensitivity 67-99  - BAL DFA (sensitivity 90-99  - Specificity >99 |  |
| **Treatment** | - **First-line**: High-dose TMP-SMX × 21 days    - **Adjunctive steroids**: if PaO$_2$ <70 mmHg or A-a gradient ≥35 mmHg    - **Alternatives**: Pentamidine, Atovaquone, Dapsone+TMP |  |
| **Prophylaxis** | - TMP-SMX (preferred)    - Continue until CD4 >200 for ≥3 months |  |
| **Opportunistic Infections by CD4 Count** | - Any CD4: TB, VZV reactivation    - ≤250: Coccidioidomycosis    - **≤200: PJP**    - ≤150: Histoplasmosis    - ≤100: Cryptococcus, CMV    - ≤50: MAC |  |
| **ART Timing** | - Generally: Early initiation recommended    - Exception: Delay in cryptococcal meningitis |  |
| **HIV in Older Adults** | - 41  - 34  - Screen based on risk factors, not age |  |


\vfill

*本講義整理自NEJM Case Records of the Massachusetts General Hospital*
*Case 4-2026, N Engl J Med 2026;394:498-507*
[0.3cm]
編輯：謝慕揚 Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD, FESC
*僅供教學使用，請勿用於商業用途*
